summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.workflow; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import org.json.JSONObject; import org.json.JSONArray; public class GraphEntity { private String id; private EntityType type; private String status; private List<String> actions = new ArrayList<>(); private JSONObject metadata = new JSONObject(); private String runtimeState; public GraphEntity(String id, EntityType type) { this.id = id; this.type = type; this.status = "IDLE"; } public String getId() { return id; } public EntityType getType() { return type; } public String getStatus() { return status; }
